steps.title: Total customers
steps.content: The table’s bottom‑right corner shows the total number of customers as 135.

steps.title: Customers at least 40 years old
steps.content:
The row for customers aged 40 or older shows a total of 105 customers (sum across all visit columns).
The probability is therefore $$ \frac{105}{135} $$.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
